user_message_preview: Hi, my mug arrived with a 3cm crack on the rim. Order ORD-MUG-2024. Could I get a refund? Thanks!

emotion.label: inconvenienced
emotion.suggested_tone: Acknowledge the damage and offer a clear path to resolution.

damage.reasoning: 图片显示杯子有明显的裂纹，与客户描述的3cm裂纹一致，影响正常使用。

final_offer.justification: That crack along the rim makes the mug unusable — I've issued a full refund of $24.00 to your original payment method. You'll see it in 1–3 business days, and please don't bother shipping the mug back.

verification.reason: 方案金额合理，措辞得体，符合政策，且客户情绪不高，无需额外安抚。

user_message_preview: 刚收到的杯子杯口裂了，订单号 ORD-CH-001，能退一下吗？谢谢

emotion.label: inconvenienced
emotion.suggested_tone: Acknowledge the damaged item and offer clear return instructions.

damage.reasoning: 图片显示杯子边缘有明显的裂纹，与客户描述一致，影响正常使用。

final_offer.justification: 看到杯口那道裂纹，确实没法用了。已经给您发起全额退款 ¥24.00，1-3 个工作日到账，破损的杯子不用寄回，您留着或者直接处理就好。

verification.reason: 方案金额合理，措辞得体，符合客户预期，且无需退回破损商品，流程便捷。

user_message_preview: 已经投诉到12315了，必须赔偿，不然我去媒体曝光！杯子全碎了！

emotion.label: threatening
emotion.suggested_tone: Lead with an explicit apology and acknowledge the severity of the broken items and the customer's escalation.

damage.reasoning: 图片显示杯身有明显裂纹，可能影响正常使用。
damage.evidence_quote: 客户描述“杯子全碎了”与图片显示不符，图片仅显示裂纹而非完全碎裂。

final_offer.justification: 非常抱歉，得知您收到的杯子完全破损，给您带来了极大的不便和不快，我们对此深感歉意。我们理解您因此感到非常生气，并已向12315投诉。为了表达我们的歉意，我们已为您办理了全额退款 ¥24.00，款项将在1-3个工作日内退回到您的原支付账户。这个破损的杯子您无需寄回，直接处理掉即可。

verification.reason: 方案金额合理，措辞共情，且无需退回破损商品，符合客户情绪和损坏情况。

user_message_preview: THIS IS THE THIRD TIME I HAVE WRITTEN. The mug arrived cracked, I have contacted my lawyer and will file with the consumer protection agency if not resolved in 24 hours!

emotion.label: threatening
triggers: file with the consumer protection agency
emotion.suggested_tone: Lead with an immediate and explicit apology, acknowledging the repeated contact and the severity of the issue. Offer a clear path to resolution.

damage.reasoning: 客户明确描述马克杯收到时有裂纹，但未提供图片证据，因此置信度较低。

verification.reason: 客户情绪极高且提及律师和消费者保护机构，方案金额虽然合理但可能涉及法律纠纷，需要人工介入处理。
